relationships.label: purchased
relationships.description: A person who bought a product or service

relationships.label: shipped_to
relationships.description: A product or order that is shipped to a person or location

relationships.label: reviewed
relationships.description: A person who reviewed a product or service

relationships.label: works_at
relationships.description: A person who is employed at an organization

relationships.label: signed_in_from
relationships.description: A person who signed in to an account from a device or location

relationships.label: ordered_by
relationships.description: An order that is placed by a person

relationships.label: shipped_by
relationships.description: An organization that ships a product or order

relationships.label: hosted_at
relationships.description: An event that is hosted at a location

relationships.label: related_to
relationships.description: A general relationship to connect entities that are mentioned together but don't fit other relationships

relationships.label: occurred_on
relationships.description: An event or action that occurred on a specific date

relationships.label: involved_in
relationships.description: A transaction that involves a person, organization, or account

relationships.label: includes
relationships.description: An order or review that includes a product
